description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a slim, rectangular display and a minimalist design. The front features a large, glossy screen with a subtle purple tint, surrounded by a thin black bezel. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular base connected to the screen via a single, central vertical stand. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with a circular mounting area where the stand attaches. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcement in the stand, and the design is sleek and professional, suitable for office or home environments. A 'PHILIPS' brand logo is visible at the center of the bottom bezel on the front.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen computer monitor with a thin black bezel, glossy purple-tinted display, and a central stand on a rectangular base. The 'PHILIPS' logo is visible on the front bottom bezel.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a smooth, flat back panel with a circular mounting area and the central stand attachment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile of the screen and the angled, metallic stand connecting to the rectangular base.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large, glossy screen with a purple tint, thin black bezel, and the 'PHILIPS' logo at the bottom center.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the slimness of the monitor and the angled stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and black with a matte finish, providing a minimal frame around the display. It has sharp corners and no visible decorative elements, creating a modern, understated look.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a central, vertical support attached to a flat, rectangular base. It appears metallic with a matte finish and provides stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear in the provided images.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'PHILIPS' logo is present at the center of the bottom bezel on the front, rendered in white text.
